description.unified: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1] and increases DMG by {0}%.

[Fire Rain] Increases DMG by 20%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by [20%->5%]. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional [5%->20%].
[Flame Diffusion] Ember [(added) becomes irremovable] and [(removed) Changes Ember max stacks to 14] causes the target to take {0}% increased M.DMG per stack.
Critical Rate increases by {0}, Critial DMG increase by {1}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG equal to {2}% of ATK per [Ember] stack on the target.
